GUIDE PRICEPrice on application

The Residence

Set into the terraced hillside of Green Coast Resort above Palasë, Marguerite is a 2 bed · duplex residence on the seventh floor · duplex. Full-height glazing opens the living space to the Ionian sea ahead and the Ceraunian mountains rising behind — the Albanian Riviera lived slowly: cypress, stone and sea, moments from the resort's beach, spa and restaurants.
